label: Text to KG Full
description: [EXPERIMENTAL] Scatters multiple text entities (must have 'text' property populated), chunks and extracts knowledge graph with clustering and descriptions. For raw files, use the corresponding file-to-KG workflow. This workflow includes dedupe and clustering steps that are currently unreliable and may produce unpredictable results. Not recommended for production use.

input.custom_instructions: Use existing label if appropriate. Focus on creating a concise, informative description that captures the essence of the entity and its relationships.
